creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
Update to 0.5.1. This is a critical security update - ref
http://www.sektioneins.com/en/advisories/advisory-032009-piwik-cookie-unserialize-vulnerability/

This patch superseeds my patch "ports/141325: [PATCH] www/piwik: update to 0.5"

Port maintainer (wen@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
